title: lepicystis polypodioides var. ecklonii
intro: Lepicystis polypodioides var. ecklonii, also known as the Cape or European polypody, is a species of fern native to Europe and South Africa. This fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepicystis polypodioides var. ecklonii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make remedies for various health conditions.
